name: Unroller
summary: Represents the operation of unrolling a single surface.

constructors.name: Unroller(Brep)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Unroller class with a brep.

constructors.name: Unroller(Surface)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Unroller class with surface.

methods.name: AddFollowingGeometry(Curve)
methods.summary: Adds a curve that should be unrolled along with the surface/brep.

methods.name: AddFollowingGeometry(IEnumerable<Curve>)
methods.summary: Adds curves that should be unrolled along with the surface/brep.

params.name: curves
params.doc: An array, a list or any enumerable set of curves.

methods.name: AddFollowingGeometry(IEnumerable<Point3d>)
methods.summary: Adds points that should be unrolled along with the surface/brep.

params.name: points
params.doc: An array, a list or any enumerable set of points.

methods.name: AddFollowingGeometry(IEnumerable<TextDot>)
methods.summary: Adds text dots that should be unrolled along with the surface/brep.

params.name: dots
params.doc: An array, a list or any enumerable set of text dots.

methods.name: AddFollowingGeometry(Point)
methods.summary: Adds a point that should be unrolled along with the surface/brep.

methods.name: AddFollowingGeometry(Point3d)
methods.summary: Adds a point that should be unrolled along with the surface/brep.

methods.name: AddFollowingGeometry(TextDot)
methods.summary: Adds a text dot that should be unrolled along with the surface/brep.

methods.name: AddFollowingGeometry(IEnumerable<Point3d>, IEnumerable<String>)
methods.signature: public void AddFollowingGeometry(IEnumerable<Point3d> dotLocations, IEnumerable<string> dotText)
methods.summary: Adds text dots that should be unrolled along with the surface/brep.

params.name: dotLocations
params.doc: An array, a list, or any enumerable set of dot locations.

params.name: dotText
params.doc: An array, a list, or any enumerable set of dot strings.

methods.name: AddFollowingGeometry(Point3d, String)
methods.signature: public void AddFollowingGeometry(Point3d dotLocation, string dotText)
methods.summary: Adds a text dot that should be unrolled along with the surface/brep.

methods.name: FollowingGeometryIndex(Curve)
methods.summary: Given an unrolled curve, returns the index of the source, or following curve.

params.name: curve
params.doc: An unrolled curve returned by Unroller.PerformUnroll.

returns.doc: The index of the curve added by Unroller.AddFollowingGeometry if successful, otherwise -1.

methods.name: FollowingGeometryIndex(TextDot)
methods.summary: Given an unrolled text dot, returns the index of the source, or following text dot.

params.name: dot
params.doc: An unrolled text dot returned by Unroller.PerformUnroll.

returns.doc: The index of the text dot added by Unroller.AddFollowingGeometry if successful, otherwise -1.

params.name: flatbreps
params.doc: List of breps containing flattened results.

methods.name: PerformUnroll(Curve[], Point3d[], TextDot[])
methods.signature: public Brep[] PerformUnroll(out Curve[] unrolledCurves, out Point3d[] unrolledPoints, out TextDot[] unrolledDots)

params.name: unrolledCurves
params.doc: An array of unrolled curves is assigned during the call in this out parameter.

params.name: unrolledPoints
params.doc: An array of unrolled points is assigned during the call in this out parameter.

params.name: unrolledDots
params.doc: An array of unrolled text dots is assigned during the call in this out parameter.

returns.doc: An array of breps. This array can be empty.

properties.name: AbsoluteTolerance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the absolute tolerance for the unrolling operation. Absolute tolerance is used in the evaluation of new entities, such as intersections, re-projections and splits.In the current implementation, absolute tolerance is used in tessellating rails, fitting curves and pulling back trims.

properties.name: ExplodeOutput
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value determining whether geometry should be exploded.

properties.name: ExplodeSpacing
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value determining whether spacing should be exploded.

properties.name: RelativeTolerance
properties.summary: Gets or sets the relative tolerance for the unrolling operation. Relative tolerance is used in the evaluation of intrinsic properties, such as computations "along" the surface or brep.In the current implementation, relative tolerance is used to decide if a surface is flat enough to try to unroll. That helps ease the scale dependency. The surface has to be linear in one direction within (length * RelativeTolerance) to be considered linear for that purpose. Otherwise smash will ignore that tolerance and unroll anything.
